title: Slabs Expanded (Discontinued)
description: Stack different slabs into one block, adds slab variants for every block, and craft blocks from slabs
body:
This mod makes slabs feel complete and adds functionality to them that I feel like should be in the base game.

 

Stack different slabs on top of each other

  • These double slab blocks calculate their hardness based on the slabs they are built from
  • When mined they drop the slabs they are built from
  • For this to work the slab must be in the slabs.json tag

 

 

Slab variants for every block

  • They try to keep their properties like hardness, explosion resistance, and luminance
  • You get them by crafting them in the stonecutter

Craft slabs back into blocks

  • Works for slabs from this mod and vanilla slabs

This mod is still a work in progress and the especialy forge versions are not fully finished so please report any issues, bugs, and glitches you encounter.
